accessNotes.en: Prosvasi odikos apo to Agkistri eos to idiotika diacheirizomeno simeio tis Aponisou. Einai organomeni vrachodis/votsaloti akti me kathara nera, peyka, taverna kai simeia gia vouties apo vrachia.
accessNotes.gr: Πρόσβαση οδικώς από το Αγκίστρι έως το ιδιωτικά διαχειριζόμενο σημείο της Απόνησου. Είναι οργανωμένη βραχώδης/βοτσαλωτή ακτή με καθαρά νερά, πεύκα, ταβέρνα και σημεία για βουτιές από βράχια.
accessNotes.fr: Prosvasi odikos apo to Agkistri eos to idiotika diacheirizomeno simeio tis Aponisou. Einai organomeni vrachodis/votsaloti akti me kathara nera, peyka, taverna kai simeia gia vouties apo vrachia.

metadata.sourceNotes: Agistri guides describe Aponisos as one of the island’s main organized/private-managed swimming spots.

accessNotes.en: Prosvasi apo ton dromo tou nisioy. I Dragonera einai votsaloti akti kato apo peyka, me epochiki organosi, xaplostres/ompreles, kantina kai dynatotita gia thalassia spor se periodous leitourgias.
accessNotes.gr: Πρόσβαση από τον δρόμο του νησιού. Η Δραγονέρα είναι βοτσαλωτή ακτή κάτω από πεύκα, με εποχική οργάνωση, ξαπλώστρες/ομπρέλες, καντίνα και δυνατότητα για θαλάσσια σπορ σε περιόδους λειτουργίας.

sourceNotes: Source-backed Agistri pass 2026-05-28: We Love Agistri describes Xekofti as a pebbly isolated beach about 1 km west of Megalochori, accessible by bus, with pines close to the water and no listed organized services. Confidence lifted to medium; coordinates, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.

Popular confidence pass 2026-06-02 I: direct municipality, official accessibility, or dedicated local beach sources support the recorded static identity, access, terrain, and service context for this record. Promoted to high for static beach facts only; windProfile, scoring, coordinates, photos, and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

sourceNotes: Source-backed Agistri pass 2026-05-28: We Love Agistri describes Megalochori Beach as long, sandy in places and pebbly in others, with a small organized sunbed area and nearby shops, restaurants, cafes, and bars. Confidence lifted to medium; coordinates, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.

Popular confidence pass 2026-06-02 I: direct municipality, official accessibility, or dedicated local beach sources support the recorded static identity, access, terrain, and service context for this record.
